name: Ramandeep Kaur
quote: Our cost-per-lead stayed steady even as we scaled ad spend past fifteen lakh a month — that only happens when the creative pipeline doesn't run dry.

name: Daniel Ho
quote: The product visuals finally looked like the precision parts we actually sell, not stock photography with our logo pasted on top.

name: Priya Menon
quote: Harcharan was the one designer on the team who could take a rough international client brief and come back with something on-brand, fast.
